title: Agent Guardrails Configuration
description: Machine-readable boundaries and constraints for AI agents.

protectedPaths.description: Glob patterns of files/directories that agents must not modify without human approval.

requireApprovalFor.description: Types of changes that require human review, e.g., 'database migrations', 'major dependency bumps'.

maxFilesPerChange.description: Warning threshold for number of files touched in a single change.

maxLinesPerChange.description: Warning threshold for number of lines touched in a single change.

forbiddenActions.description: Actions agents must never take, e.g., 'deploy to production'.

requireApprovalFor: changes to authentication or authorization logic
forbiddenActions: modify authentication middleware without security review
commit secrets, API keys, or credentials
